title: Normalize Shared Core Language
summary: Deplanifies shared standards, reusable-core READMEs, and registries while keeping current pack paths as concrete repo facts.
scope_items: Update shared engineering standards to use pack-neutral policy language.
Align reusable-core READMEs and the shared Python workspace README with the same boundary framing.
Adjust shared registries so mirrored and pack-owned roots are described generically.
done_when_items: The targeted shared-core docs and registries use pack-neutral policy language and keep only concrete current-repo pack examples where required.
